untranslatable_reason: Signal requires linear regression residuals and z-score calculations on fitted model residuals, which are not available in the allowed indicator set. The strategy depends on: (1) fitting a linear regression over a 40-day lookback, (2) computing residuals, (3) standardizing residuals as z-scores, and (4) triggering on z-score thresholds (±2.0 entry, ±0.25 exit). These are domain-specific quantitative constructs that cannot be expressed using the provided indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, Returns, Bar Properties). A grid search optimization framework is also not representable in this rule schema.
translation_notes: This is a sophisticated pair-trading mean reversion strategy based on statistical model residuals. The signal cannot be translated to the allowed indicator vocabulary. Implementation would require custom indicator development (linear regression, residual computation, z-score standardization) within the backtest engine or a more flexible rule language that supports custom calculations.
